docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CALLAHAN MARKETING INC,DBA T/CHOICE F/STAFFING AS TO DEFENDANT MILE HIGH ADVENTURES & ENTERTAIMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILE HIGH ADVENTURES & ENTERTAIMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALLAHAN MARKETING INC,DBA T/CHOICE F/STAFFING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILE HIGH ADVENTURES & ENTERTAIMENT $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,246.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. SUSPENSE DATE JUNE 7, 1999. NOTICE SENT TO DEFT. MILE HIGH ADVENTURE & ENTERTAINMENT.
DEFENDANT'S REPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION GIVEN TO NORA;
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT:DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
